subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in remembrance of God! Rumi in his odes doth say, and in his Mathnavi doth relate that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی ملا رومی در غزلیات خویش میگوید و در مثنوی حکایت مینماید که
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
